backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music) and CRUD operations for a wedding invitation SaaS platform, using in-memory Maps for storage and exposing public shared functions for create/update/publish/query.
backend/migration.mo: Stub migration module with empty OldActor and NewActor types and a no-op `run` function that passes the old actor through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a single audit/fix feature (data flow between TemplateThemeStep, ColorSchemePicker, FontSelector, and TemplatePreview via InvitationFormContext) to its affected file and test requirement REQ-4.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries for all frontend source files, serving as a reference index of each component and page's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) applied via @layer base.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for landing, create wizard, dashboard, invitation editor, and guest invitation pages, plus a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: Modal dialog displaying RSVP responses and summary stats (total, confirmed, declined) for a given invitation, fetched via React Query hooks and rendered in a scrollable list with formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: Styled card component for a single wedding event, showing event type icon/label, formatted date/time/venue, and edit/delete action buttons with per-event-type color theming.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing a wedding event, with fields for event type, title, date, time, venue, and description, using controlled state and calling onSave/onCancel callbacks.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: Displays a live countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds) to the wedding date/time, updating every second and styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: Renders a guest-facing section showing the invitation message and family details, styled with the invitation's template colors and animated on scroll into view.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: Renders a sorted list of wedding event cards (with date, time, venue, and description) for the guest view, each card animated on scroll and styled by event type and template.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Full-screen hero section for the guest invitation page displaying the couple's names, wedding date, venue, optional couple photo, and a parallax background, animated on load and styled by the selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo grid for the guest invitation page with a fullscreen lightbox supporting previous/next navigation, styled by the invitation's template.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: A guest-facing RSVP form component that collects name, phone, attendance, guest count, and message, then submits the response via a mutation hook and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Displays the wedding venue name, address, and an optional Google Maps link button, styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL using the couple's names.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders one of three decorative divider variants (mandala image, line, or flourish image) with SVG/inline fallbacks if images fail to load.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A fixed site header with scroll-aware styling, a logo, desktop navigation links, and a collapsible mobile menu for navigating to Home, Dashboard, and Create Invitation.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A fixed floating audio player that supports play/pause, mute, and volume control for background music, with optional autoplay and an expandable controls panel.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A form component for uploading background music files, with preview play/pause, removal, and an autoplay toggle that updates the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop photo gallery upload component that reads image files as data URLs and stores them in the invitation form context, with a grid display and per-photo delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) that renders shimmer placeholder elements using the shadcn Skeleton primitive.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid-based color scheme selector that displays swatches from predefined COLOR_SCHEMES and highlights the currently selected scheme with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: A grid-based font pairing selector that previews each font's heading style using predefined FONT_CHOICES and marks the selected option with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: Renders a live preview of the wedding invitation by resolving the selected template, color scheme, font, background style, border style, and accent intensity into inline CSS styles.
Displays all available invitation templates grouped by category in a grid, with each card showing a styled mini-preview and highlighting the currently selected template.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step for entering couple details including a drag-and-drop couple photo upload and input fields for bride and groom names and other related information.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: A wizard step for managing wedding events, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via EventForm and EventCard components, with events sorted chronologically.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: A wizard step component that renders the photo gallery upload and background music uploader sections for a wedding invitation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: A multi-step progress bar component that displays step circles with completed/active states and a connecting animated line.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: A wizard step that lets users choose a unique URL slug for their invitation and displays a summary of couple details, events, template, and media selections before publishing.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: A wizard step for selecting and customizing the invitation template, color scheme, fonts, and background, with support for saving and applying named theme variants.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: Defines the React context and provider for managing multi-step wedding invitation form state, including couple details, events, template settings, and media.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for invitations, events, photos, RSVPs, background music, and theme config, using the ICP actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Exports two hooks: useScrollAnimation for triggering visibility state via IntersectionObserver, and useLazyLoad for lazy-loading images when they enter the viewport.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for a luxury wedding color palette (light and dark modes), and adds utility classes for gradients and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: Multi-step wizard page for creating a wedding invitation, handling form validation per step and sequentially calling backend mutations to create the invitation, add events, upload photos, and set background music.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying all user invitations as cards with options to edit, preview, publish, delete, and view RSVP responses, using query hooks and an alert dialog for deletion confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Public guest-facing invitation page that fetches invitation data by slug and renders themed sections including hero, countdown, couple intro, event timeline, photo gallery, venue map, and RSVP form.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Full-page invitation editor with tabbed wizard steps (couple details, events, template, media), save/publish actions, a publish-success modal with copy/WhatsApp sharing, and an RSVP responses modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing app features, sample invitation previews, and a hero section with parallax scrolling, linking visitors to sign up or view the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page with a decorative heart icon, descriptive message, and navigation buttons back to the home page and dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Exports reusable animation constants and helper functions (duration presets, easing curves, fadeIn/slideUp/scaleIn variants, and stagger delay utilities) for use across components.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Defines per-event-type configuration objects (label, icon, colors, CSS classes) for all Indian wedding event types and exports a lookup helper function.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines the full list of invitation template definitions (colors, fonts, backgrounds, gradients) across categories like royal-indian, modern-minimal, and cinematic-dark.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a luxury color palette (gold, crimson, ivory, blush), custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant, Playfair), shadow utilities, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for a web app fix request where Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not updating the live preview or persisting correctly. Defines existing features and pending action requests (AR-1 through AR-5) related to data flow between TemplateThemeStep, context, and TemplatePreview.
